text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you were very close. The claw machine is a
tricky opponent indeed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize. It's enough for me
that you made the effort.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I hope you all find someone kind to take care of
you, little plushies...
